import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Minimal observation for navigation task."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position (normalized to [0, 1])
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_agent_y = agent_pos[0] / (H - 1)
    norm_agent_x = agent_pos[1] / (W - 1)
    
    # Agent direction (normalized to [0, 1])
    norm_direction = state.agent.direction.astype(jnp.float32) / 3.0
    
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)  # GOAL tile has ID 6
    
    # Get coordinates using meshgrid
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Goal position (normalized)
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    norm_goal_y = goal_y / (H - 1)
    norm_goal_x = goal_x / (W - 1)
    
    # Direction to goal (normalized to [-1, 1])
    goal_dir_y = (goal_y - agent_pos[0]) / (H - 1)
    goal_dir_x = (goal_x - agent_pos[1]) / (W - 1)
    
    # Minimal observation: just 6 features
    observation = jnp.array([
        norm_agent_y,    # Agent Y position
        norm_agent_x,    # Agent X position  
        norm_direction,  # Agent direction (scalar)
        norm_goal_y,     # Goal Y position
        norm_goal_x,     # Goal X position
        goal_dir_y + goal_dir_x  # Combined direction to goal
    ], dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    return observation

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Simple reward for navigation task."""
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    
    # Calculate Manhattan distances (simpler than Euclidean)
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_agent_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    prev_dist = jnp.abs(agent_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos[1] - goal_x)
    curr_dist = jnp.abs(next_agent_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(next_agent_pos[1] - goal_x)
    
    # Simple distance shaping
    distance_reward = prev_dist - curr_dist
    
    # Check if agent reached goal
    agent_on_goal = (next_state.grid[next_agent_pos[0].astype(jnp.int32), 
                                   next_agent_pos[1].astype(jnp.int32), 0] == 6)
    goal_bonus = jax.lax.select(agent_on_goal, 5.0, 0.0)
    
    # Only two reward components
    total_reward = distance_reward + goal_bonus
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
